questions.question: What California city's proletariat beheaded or disabled two-thirds of the town's 3,600 parking meters in 1998?
What 1972 best-selling book was subtitled A Gourmet Guide to Lovemaking?
Who failed to heed the advice of his scouts Mitch Bouyer and Bloody Knife?
What type of cancer was tamoxifen the first drug to effectively combat, according to researchers in 1998?
What apparatus do male gymnasts refer to as 'the pig'?
What outfit once had a Xerox repairman install a movie camera inside a copier at the Soviet Embassy in Washington?
